item.title: [Segurança] Citrix Urges Patching Critical NetScaler Flaw Allowing Unauthenticated Data Leaks
item.description:
🚨 Citrix Urges Patching Critical NetScaler Flaw Allowing Unauthenticated Data Leaks
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.3
Resumo:
Citrix has released security updates to address two vulnerabilities in NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway, including a critical flaw that could be exploited to leak sensitive data from the application. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2026-3055 (CVSS score: 9.3) - Insufficient input validation leading to memory overread CVE-2026-4368 (CVSS score: 7.7) - Race condition leading to user
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/citrix-urges-patching-critical.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-27651 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-27651 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
When the ngx_mail_auth_http_module module is enabled on NGINX Plus or NGINX Open Source, undisclosed requests can cause worker processes to terminate. This issue may occur when (1) CRAM-MD5 or APOP authentication is enabled, and (2) the authentication server permits retry by returning the Auth-Wait response header. Note: Software versions which have reached End of Technical Support (EoTS) are not evaluated.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27651

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-33307 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-33307 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Mod_gnutls is a TLS module for Apache HTTPD based on GnuTLS. In versions prior to 0.12.3 and 0.13.0, code for client certificate verification imported the certificate chain sent by the client into a fixed size `gnutls_x509_crt_t x509[]` array without checking the number of certificates is less than or equal to the array size. `gnutls_x509_crt_t` is a `typedef` for a pointer to an opaque GnuTLS structure created using...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33307

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-2580 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-2580 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The WP Maps – Store Locator,Google Maps,OpenStreetMap,Mapbox,Listing,Directory & Filters plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to time-based SQL Injection via the ‘orderby’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.9.1 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2580

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8094-3: Linux kernel (Real-time) vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8094-3: Linux kernel (Real-time) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the AppArmor Linux kernel Security Module (LSM). An unprivileged local attacker could use these issues to load, replace, and remove arbitrary AppArmor profiles causing denial of service, exposure of sensitive information (kernel memory), local privilege escalation, or possibly escape a container. (LP: #2143853) It was discovered that some AMD Zen 5 processors...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8094-3

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8112-5: Linux kernel (Azure) vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8112-5: Linux kernel (Azure) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - x86 architecture; - MMC subsystem; - Network drivers; - USB Device Class drivers; - BTRFS file system; - HFS+ file system; - XFRM subsystem; - IPv4 networking; - IPv6 networking; - MAC80211 subsystem; - Simplified Mandatory Access Control...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8112-5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8118-1: sized-chunks vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8118-1: sized-chunks vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Yechan Bae discovered that sized-chunks did not properly validate array size when constructing Chunk. An attacker could possibly use these issues to cause out-of-bounds access, leading to memory corruption or undefined behavior. (CVE-2020-25791, CVE-2020-25792, CVE-2020-25793) Yechan Bae discovered that sized-chunks had a memory safety issue in the clone implementation when a panic occurs. An attacker could possibly...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8118-1

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] A Vulnerability in Oracle Products Could Allow for Remote Code Execution
item.description:
📢 A Vulnerability in Oracle Products Could Allow for Remote Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a CIS Advisories, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/a-vulnerability-in-oracle-products-could-allow-for-remote-code-execution_2026-024

item.title: [Segurança] Checkpoint launches secure AI advisory service for enterprise AX - 디지털투데이

Resumo:

item.title: [Segurança] Yanluowang ransomware access broker gets 81 months in prison
item.description:
📰 Yanluowang ransomware access broker gets 81 months in prison
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A Russian national was sentenced to nearly 7 years in prison after pleading guilty to acting as an initial access broker (IAB) for Yanluowang ransomware attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/yanluowang-ransomware-access-broker-gets-81-months-in-prison/

item.title: [Segurança] HackerOne discloses employee data breach after Navia hack
item.description:
📰 HackerOne discloses employee data breach after Navia hack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Bug bounty platform HackerOne is notifying hundreds of employees that their data was stolen after attackers hacked Navia, one of its U.S.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackerone-discloses-employee-data-breach-after-navia-hack/

item.title: [Segurança] Dutch Ministry of Finance discloses breach affecting employees
item.description:
📰 Dutch Ministry of Finance discloses breach affecting employees
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Dutch Ministry of Finance confirmed on Monday that some of its systems were breached in a cyberattack detected last week.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/dutch-ministry-of-finance-discloses-breach-affecting-employees/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Enhanced Security Visibility: Bitnami Images Now Fully Scanned by Anchore Tools
item.description:
📰 Enhanced Security Visibility: Bitnami Images Now Fully Scanned by Anchore Tools
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
We are excited to announce an enhancement to the security reporting for all Bitnami images: Bitnami Secure Images are now correctly and fully scanned by Anchore’s open source project Grype analysis tools. This crucial integration means that when you use Anchore’s suite of security analysis tools on any official …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/enhanced-security-visibility-bitnami-images-now-fully-scanned-by-anchore-tools/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Trivy supply chain compromise: What Docker Hub users should know
item.description:
📰 Trivy supply chain compromise: What Docker Hub users should know
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
We wanted to provide you information about a security incident that we became aware of that affects customers who use the Aqua Security Vulnerability scanner (Trivy) across multiple distribution channels including Docker Hub, GitHub, and npm. Between 18:24 UTC on March 19, 2026 and 01:36 UTC on March 23, 2026, Docker Hub customers who pulled...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/trivy-supply-chain-compromise-what-docker-hub-users-should-know/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Save the Registration Date for Las Vegas
item.description:
📰 Save the Registration Date for Las Vegas
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Join us at VMware ExploreLas Vegas, Nevada | The VenetianAug. 3, 2026 Registration Goes Live April 28 Save the Registration Date Get the latest training at Explore and be the first to reap the benefits of a modern private cloud platform. Come for the certifications, labs, and sessions, and leave with the …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/explore/save-the-registration-date/
